inputs.srepr: Mul(Rational(1, 2), Pow(Symbol('mu', positive=True, real=True), Integer(2)), Pow(Function('a')(Symbol('tau', positive=True, real=True)), Integer(2)))

output.srepr: Mul(Pow(Symbol('mu', positive=True, real=True), Integer(2)), Function('a')(Symbol('tau', positive=True, real=True)))

method: dE/da for E = (1/2) mu^2 a^2; relaxation law da/dtau = -Gamma mu^2 a
